evals.prompt: Create RSA ads based on the following analysis. The analysis covers SafeTeam's camera surveillance page. One keyword cluster: 'Kamerabevakning brf' (under ## Keyword clusters) with keywords: "kamerabevakning brf", "kameraövervakning brf", "övervakningskamera brf", "kamerabevakning bostadsrättsförening", "kamerabevakning garage brf", "kamerabevakning parkeringsgarage brf", "kamerabevakning trapphus brf", "kamerabevakning soprum brf". **Target segment:** styrelseledamöter i brf:er. **Offer:** kamerabevakning. **Search intent:** transactional. The analysis Summary section has **Geography:** Ingen avgränsning (nationell). Final URL: https://safeteam.se/vi-erbjuder/kamerabevakning/. **Sender:** SafeTeam (30+ years experience, own 24/7 monitoring center, full service from design to installation to maintenance). No additional marketing context.
evals.expected_output: A Markdown file with complete RSA ad copy: Campaign name, Ad group name, all keywords listed with phrase match quotes, Location targeting as numeric Criteria ID (2752 for Sweden), final URL, display paths (max 15 chars each), 15 headlines (max 30 chars each, mix of keyword match/benefit/credibility/differentiation/CTA with correct pinning), 4 descriptions (max 90 chars each with correct pinning). No annotations after ad text. Validation script should pass.

evals.prompt: Now I want ads. Use the analysis file at analysis.md which covers Spiris accounting software. Create ads for two clusters from ## Keyword clusters: 1) 'Bokföringsprogram' (keywords: "bokföringsprogram", "bokföringsprogram enskild firma", "bokföringsprogram aktiebolag", "bokföringsprogram online", "bokföringsprogram molnbaserat", "bokföringsapp", "bokföringssystem", "ekonomiprogram") **Target segment:** enskilda firmor. **Offer:** bokföringsprogram. **Search intent:** commercial investigation. 2) 'Bokföringsprogram nystart' (keywords: "bokföringsprogram nystartat företag", "bokföringsprogram nytt företag", "bokföring nystartat bolag", "billigt bokföringsprogram nystart") **Target segment:** nystartade företag. **Offer:** bokföringsprogram. **Search intent:** transactional. **Geography:** Ingen avgränsning (nationell). URL: spiris.se/ekonomiplattform/bokforing-fakturering. CTA: 'Testa gratis'. Spiris (formerly Visma eEkonomi), prices from 199 SEK/month, new businesses get half price.
evals.expected_output: Two Markdown files (one per cluster) in a campaign folder. Each with complete RSA structure: English field names (Campaign, Ad group, Keywords, Location targeting with Criteria ID 2752, Headline N (P), Description N (P)), 15 headlines and 4 descriptions within character limits. Keywords wrapped in phrase match quotes. The startup cluster should leverage the half-price offer. Validation script should pass on both files.
